mnemonics.title: SARSA Principle
mnemonics.content: State-Action-Reward-State-Action: Remember the basic interaction loop - the agent observes State, takes Action, receives Reward, reaches new State, and takes new Action.

mnemonics.title: PEP-VAR Model
mnemonics.content: Policy Environment Policy - Value Action Reward: Components interact as Agent perceives state from Environment, selects Action based on Policy, receives Reward, and updates Value estimates to improve Policy.

mnemonics.title: 8 Components Memory
mnemonics.content: AERV PVM: Agent, Environment, Reward, State, Policy, Value, Model - The core building blocks of every RL system.

mnemonics.title: Reward vs Value
mnemonics.content: R.I.T.E. - Reward = Immediate Today, Expected tomorrow: Rewards are immediate feedback; Value is Expected long-term cumulative reward.

mnemonics.title: Policy Types
mnemonics.content: D.S.P. - Deterministic: State→Action; Stochastic: State→Probability distribution: Remember deterministic maps to specific actions while stochastic provides probabilities.
